prompt: I have a Diagnosis feature on my Image table and I need to add labels for 500 images. How do I figure out what values I can use and what columns are required?

assertions.name: reads_feature_resource
assertions.description: Should read deriva://feature/Image/Diagnosis to inspect column schema

assertions.name: identifies_required_vs_optional
assertions.description: Should explain which columns are required and which are optional

assertions.name: reads_vocabulary_for_valid_values
assertions.description: Should read the vocabulary resource to show valid term values

assertions.name: shows_add_feature_value_call
assertions.description: Should show the correct add_feature_value or add_feature_value_record tool call

assertions.name: wraps_in_execution
assertions.description: Should mention wrapping value addition in an execution for provenance
